## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Risks

- Any migration, compatibility, or rollout concerns?

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs or examples when public behavior changed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or local environment files
- [ ] I kept the change scoped to one topic
